steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The ‘Still’ in the final sentence signals a contrast between the architects' natural inspiration and the literal impossibility of the Casa Amatller’s elements growing in a forest. The transition must bridge this shift.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice A, ‘Of course,’ introduces an obvious clarification (the house’s flourishes are not literal plants) that softens the initial claim. The other three choices either misrepresent the contrast (Thus, Furthermore) or add irrelevant details (Similarly). That matches choice A — A is correct.
